findings.evidence: The endpoint /invoice returns invoice data based on invoice_id without verifying that current_user_id matches the invoice owner_id.
findings.recommendation: Implement authorization checks to ensure that the current_user_id matches the owner_id of the requested invoice before returning the invoice data.

summary: The code exposes an Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) vulnerability by returning invoice data without verifying ownership. This allows any user to access any invoice by changing the invoice_id parameter.
